content_description:
Short viral sports edits with cinematic, high-energy visuals.

Focus on unexpected or underrated people suddenly dominating in sports (basketball, soccer, street games).

Fast-paced, dramatic, emotional. Strong hook in first 2 seconds, quick cuts, slow-motion highlights.

Realistic but slightly surreal vibe. Intense, inspiring, “how did that just happen?” energy.
style_targets:
Cinematic lighting, high contrast, dramatic shadows. Fast cuts mixed with slow-motion impact moments.

Close-up shots of faces, eyes, and movement. Slight camera shake and zoom-ins for intensity.

Minimal text, bold captions, clean modern font. Dark background with bright highlights.

Feels like a mix of street sports clips and cinematic edits, intense and slightly surreal.
